title: Runtime
description: The core runtime. It IS the graph (the SurrealDB substrate) plus identity, memory, and the agents that act on it. It executes (agents respond), remembers (memory = the recorded events/state it reads back from the graph), and knows (the graph is its knowledge). The runtime is protocol-agnostic: it never embeds a wire protocol. All protocols attach only at the edges, as Touchpoints speaking Protocols, realized by sidecar adapters.
